details.test: Task 1: Save earliest 4th-grade math club under $40 ending by 4:30 PM
Task 2: Plan vegetarian, nut-free school lunches for Week of March 9 (up to 3 days)
Task 3: Save earliest bus route to Oak Street arriving before 7:45 AM
Task 4: Save two April evening events for 1st-grade families between 5–8 PM
Task 5: Contact the most experienced 3rd-grade math teacher
Task 6: Bookmark 2nd-grade homework policy limiting nightly homework to 30 minutes
Task 7: Create 2nd-grade supply checklist with items costing $5 or less
Task 8: Submit interest form for July camp 9 AM–3 PM under $150/week
